description: This file defines a service for searching roles based on persona-driven recommendations. It includes functions for filtering roles using token-based matching, handling cached data, and fetching recommendation pools. The main exported function, `exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven`, performs role searches considering cached data or triggering data fetches if necessary.

methods.name: _normStr(v)
methods.description: Normalizes a string value by converting it to a trimmed string, handling null or undefined inputs.

methods.name: _safeSlice(arr, n)
methods.description: Safely slices an array to a maximum of n elements, returning an empty array if input is not an array.

methods.name: _matchesQuery(role, qLower)
methods.description: Checks if all tokens from the query are present within the role's title, industry, description, and skills fields.

methods.name: _looksLikeLegacySimpleRecommendedRole(r)
methods.description: Determines if a role object matches the shape of legacy simple recommended roles by checking for presence of 'match_reason' string.

methods.name: _looksLikeInitialRecommendationsPool(roles)
methods.description: Checks if a roles array resembles the initial recommendations pool, excluding legacy simple recommended roles.

methods.name: exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven({ q, limit = 30, personaId = null } = {})
methods.description: Main function for performing a persona-driven explore search for roles, utilizing cached data if available, or fetching new data otherwise.

ctags.name: exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven
ctags.pattern: /^export async function exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven({ q, limit = 30, personaId = null } = {}) /
